Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class ProgramSV

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSV
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
Declaration, MemberDeclaration, Expression, ExpressionStatement, ExpressionContainer, Label, LoopInitializer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, IExecutionContext, MemberReference, MethodName, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, Branch, IForUpdates, IGuard, ILoopInit, StatementContainer, TerminalProgramElement, Named, IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, Operator, ParsableVariable, SchemaVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, UpdateableOperator, ProgramConstruct, Sorted, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class ProgramSV extends AbstractSV implements ProgramConstruct, UpdateableOperator
Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators. The particular construct being matched is determined by the ProgramSVSort of the schema variable.

      Get comments.

      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface Label
      Specified by:

      Returns:

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Returns the start position of the primary token of this element. To get the start position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getStartPosition in interface Label
      Specified by:
      getStartPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the start position of the primary token.

      Returns the end position of the primary token of this element. To get the end position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getLastElement().

      getEndPosition in interface Label
      Specified by:
      getEndPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the end position of the primary token.

      public SourceElement.Position getRelativePosition()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Returns the relative position (number of blank heading lines and columns) of the primary token of this element. To get the relative position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getRelativePosition in interface Label
      Specified by:
      getRelativePosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the relative position of the primary token.

    • match

      public MatchConditions match(SourceData source, MatchConditions matchCond)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
      matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
      Specified by:
      match in interface ProgramElement
      Parameters:
      source - the SourceData with the program element to match
      matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
      Returns:
      the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed

      layout in interface SchemaVariable
      Parameters:
      layouter - the layouter to use

      getParameterType in interface IProgramMethod
      Parameters:

    • getParamTypes

      public ImmutableArray<KeYJavaType> getParamTypes()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Returns the parameter types of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
      Specified by:
      getParamTypes in interface IObserverFunction
      Specified by:
      getParamTypes in interface IProgramMethod

    • getContainerType

      public KeYJavaType getContainerType()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Returns the container type of this symbol; for non-static observer symbols, this corresponds to the sort of its second argument.
      Specified by:
      getContainerType in interface IObserverFunction

    • getNumParams

      public int getNumParams()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Gives the number of parameters of the observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object. Thus, for observer symbols representing model fields, this will always return 0.
      Specified by:
      getNumParams in interface IObserverFunction

    • getParamType

      public KeYJavaType getParamType(int i)
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Gives the type of the i-th parameter of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
      Specified by:
      getParamType in interface IObserverFunction

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognise
